mentions.note: GTA 6 positioning is winner; CEO Strauss Zelnick has real hit. Stock down 6% today; would not buy all at once due to erratic trading. Wait for pullback or entry near $100.
Independent video game publisher hit on Project Genie fears; real AI disruption threat to AAA game dev economics but company has strong franchises and IP.
GTA 6 (November 19) greatest entertainment IP; Google Project Genie threat overstated — indie devs need Take-Two distribution/marketing. Mobile +19%, NBA 2K +30%, catalog 35% bookings.
